'''yoyadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:zingiberoid|zingiberoid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-y-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zingiberoid|zingiberoid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yoyadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yoyadithi|yoyadithi]] || [[word:yoyadiji|yoyadiji]] || [[word:yoyadishi|yoyadishi]] || [[word:yoyadiki|yoyadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yoyaduthuthu|yoyaduthuthu]] || [[word:yoyadujuju|yoyadujuju]] || [[word:yoyadushushu|yoyadushushu]] || [[word:yoyadukuku|yoyadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yoyaduthu|yoyaduthu]] || [[word:yoyaduju|yoyaduju]] || [[word:yoyadushu|yoyadushu]] || [[word:yoyaduku|yoyaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yoyadufthuf|yoyadufthuf]] || [[word:yoyadufjuf|yoyadufjuf]] || [[word:yoyadufshuf|yoyadufshuf]] || [[word:yoyadufkuf|yoyadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yoyadethe|yoyadethe]] || [[word:yoyadeje|yoyadeje]] || [[word:yoyadeshe|yoyadeshe]] || [[word:yoyadeke|yoyadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yoyadothotho|yoyadothotho]] || [[word:yoyadojojo|yoyadojojo]] || [[word:yoyadoshosho|yoyadoshosho]] || [[word:yoyadokoko|yoyadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yoyadotho|yoyadotho]] || [[word:yoyadojo|yoyadojo]] || [[word:yoyadosho|yoyadosho]] || [[word:yoyadoko|yoyadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yoyadofthof|yoyadofthof]] || [[word:yoyadofjof|yoyadofjof]] || [[word:yoyadofshof|yoyadofshof]] || [[word:yoyadofkof|yoyadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yoyadÃŸfthÃŸf|yoyadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yoyadÃŸfjÃŸf|yoyadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yoyadÃŸfshÃŸf|yoyadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yoyadÃŸfkÃŸf|yoyadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yoyadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|yoyadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yoyadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|yoyadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yoyadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|yoyadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yoyadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|yoyadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yoyadÃŸfthÃŸf|yoyadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yoyadÃŸfjÃŸf|yoyadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yoyadÃŸfshÃŸf|yoyadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yoyadÃŸfkÃŸf|yoyadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yoyadÃŸfthÃŸf|yoyadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yoyadÃŸfjÃŸf|yoyadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yoyadÃŸfshÃŸf|yoyadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yoyadÃŸfkÃŸf|yoyadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yoyadÃḊthÃḊ|yoyadÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:yoyadÃḊjÃḊ|yoyadÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:yoyadÃḊshÃḊ|yoyadÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:yoyadÃḊkÃḊ|yoyadÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yoyadathatha|yoyadathatha]] || [[word:yoyadajaja|yoyadajaja]] || [[word:yoyadashasha|yoyadashasha]] || [[word:yoyadakaka|yoyadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yoyadatha|yoyadatha]] || [[word:yoyadaja|yoyadaja]] || [[word:yoyadasha|yoyadasha]] || [[word:yoyadaka|yoyadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yoyadafthaf|yoyadafthaf]] || [[word:yoyadafjaf|yoyadafjaf]] || [[word:yoyadafshaf|yoyadafshaf]] || [[word:yoyadafkaf|yoyadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yoyadasha|yoyadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yoyadshÃḋasha|yoyadshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yoyadroasha|yoyadroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yoyadmuasha|yoyadmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yoyadyaasha|yoyadyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyoyadnkshÃḋasha|goyoyadnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyoyadnkroasha|goyoyadnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyoyadnkmuasha|goyoyadnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyoyadnkyaasha|goyoyadnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yoyayadasha|yoyayadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yoyayadshÃḋasha|yoyayadshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yoyayadroasha|yoyayadroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yoyayadmuasha|yoyayadmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yoyayadyaasha|yoyayadyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyoyayadnkshÃḋasha|goyoyayadnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyoyayadnkroasha|goyoyayadnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyoyayadnkmuasha|goyoyayadnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyoyayadnkyaasha|goyoyayadnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yeyÃḊdasha|yeyÃḊdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yeyÃḊdshÃḋasha|yeyÃḊdshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yeyÃḊdroasha|yeyÃḊdroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yeyÃḊdmuasha|yeyÃḊdmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yeyÃḊdyaasha|yeyÃḊdyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyeyÃḊdnkshÃḋasha|goyeyÃḊdnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyeyÃḊdnkroasha|goyeyÃḊdnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyeyÃḊdnkmuasha|goyeyÃḊdnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyeyÃḊdnkyaasha|goyeyÃḊdnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yoyfadasha|yoyfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yoyfadshÃḋasha|yoyfadshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yoyfadroasha|yoyfadroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yoyfadmuasha|yoyfadmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yoyfadyaasha|yoyfadyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyoyfadnkshÃḋasha|goyoyfadnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyoyfadnkroasha|goyoyfadnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyoyfadnkmuasha|goyoyfadnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyoyfadnkyaasha|goyoyfadnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
